name: Cloudflare JWT Authorization Header Enforcement
summary: Enforce presence and basic Bearer token format in Authorization header for protected API routes.
objective: Require API requests to protected paths to include an Authorization header in the form 'Bearer <token>' while allowing explicit public endpoint exclusions.
risk_mitigated: Unauthenticated access to protected API routes
Inconsistent API auth enforcement across edge routes
Accidental exposure caused by missing upstream auth checks
assumptions: JWT validation (signature, exp, iss, aud) is performed by origin/API gateway or dedicated auth service
Some endpoints (health and auth bootstrap) must remain publicly accessible

notes: Start in log mode and review at least 7 days of events before enforcing block/challenge.
After tuning exclusions, switch action to block for high-confidence enforcement.

tuning_notes: Exclude health endpoints such as /api/health, /api/healthz, and /api/status to avoid monitoring false positives.
Exclude auth bootstrap/token issuance routes (for example /api/auth/login, /api/auth/token, /api/auth/refresh) where a bearer token is not expected.
If CORS preflight is used, allow OPTIONS requests on protected paths to bypass this check.
Use exact-path exclusions where possible instead of broad prefix exclusions.

metrics: Count of matched requests missing Authorization header
Count of matched requests with malformed Bearer format
Top paths and user agents triggering matches
alerts: Sudden spike in missing/malformed Authorization matches on protected API paths
New high-volume match source on a route expected to be authenticated

rules.description: Detect requests to protected API paths that do not include a valid-looking Bearer Authorization header.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path matches "^/api(?:/.*)?$") and not (http.request.uri.path in {"/api/health" "/api/healthz" "/api/status" "/api/auth/login" "/api/auth/token" "/api/auth/refresh"}) and (http.request.method ne "OPTIONS") and not (len(http.request.headers["authorization"]) gt 0 and lower(http.request.headers["authorization"][0]) matches "^bearer\s+[^\s].*")
notes: This rule validates only presence and basic format, not JWT cryptographic integrity.
Promote to block after tuning exclusions and validating normal client behavior.

change_log.description: Initial Cloudflare pack for Authorization Bearer header presence/format enforcement on protected API paths.
